title: Generate R program to derive ADLBC (Lab (reference ranges))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADLBC (Lab (reference ranges)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: ANRIND, BNRIND, SHIFT, AVAL, BASE, ATOXGR, BTOXGR, (3) Handle reference range indicator derivation, toxicity grading, shift table variables, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 7778 records.
